features.title: Server-Side Rendering
features.description: Pages render on the server and hydrate on the client out of the box.

features.title: Route-level Data Fetching
features.description: Attach serverFetcher / clientFetcher to a route component to load data.

features.title: Cloudflare Workers Ready
features.description: The same bundle is designed to run natively on a Cloudflare Worker.

features.title: File-based JSON Source
features.description: This list is parsed from server/data/features.json by the Express server.
